heading: Download Considerations
body:
If your manual download of a backup snapshot fails, Atlas keeps
the request alive and allows you to restart the backup as long as the
most recent download failure occurred no more than one hour ago.

For Atlas clusters deployed on AWS (Amazon Web Services) or Azure (Microsoft Azure), if you
[set up a private endpoint for a cluster](cluster-private-endpoint),
Atlas allows you to download the snapshot over the private
endpoints in the same region as the snapshot. You might incur charges
for downloading the snapshot over the private endpoint. To learn more,
see [Private Endpoints](privatelink-billing).

You can download encrypted snapshots in the same way as
unencrypted snapshots. We recommend using [role-based access to your encryption key](aws-kms-enable-project) for the project as a security best practice.
